Part.Source:
If &parNfeCod = 0 For Each Order tmpNFeCod Where tmpNFeCod = &tmpNfeCod &tmpDestxCod = tmpDestxCod &tmpEmixCod = tmpEmixCod &tmpNfeProTer = tmpNfeProTer &tmpImpEntSai = tmpImpEntSai &tmplctCod = tmpLctCod &TmpnfeArqXml = tmpNfeArqXml &tmpNfeFatFilCod = tmpNfeFatFilCod &tmpFilCod = tmpFilCod
&Varchar = retornaSoNumeros.Udp(tmpEmixCpfCnpj) &nfeIsNFAe = false if not tmpNfeChv like '%'+&Varchar+'%' &nfeIsNFAe = true Endif
tmpStsNF = 'S' Exit EndFor
commit
LeituraXmlDanfe.Call(&TmpnfeArqXml, &TNfeProc)
&NfeCod = UltimoCodigoEmpresa.Udp(domParCod.NOTAFISCAL, &EmpCod, &tmpNfeFatFilCod) &parNfeCod = &NfeCod
New EmpCod = &EmpCod FilCod = &tmpNfeFatFilCod NfeCod = &NfeCod If &tmpFilCod = 0 NfeFilCod = 1 Else NfeFilCod = &tmpFilCod Endif
NfePedCod = &PedCod &Varchar = RetornaSoNumeros.Udp(&TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.ide.nNF) NfeNum = val(&Varchar) NfeSer = &TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.ide.serie.Trim() NfeSts = Status_NFe.Digitando NfeProTer = &tmpNfeProTer NfeIsNFAe = &nfeIsNFAe NfeFin.FromString(&TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.ide.finNFe.ToString())
&dhEmi = substr(&TNFeProc.NFe.infNFe.ide.dhEmi ,9,2) +'/'+ Substr(&TNFeProc.NFe.infNFe.ide.dhEmi,6,2) +'/'+ Substr(&TNFeProc.NFe.infNFe.ide.dhEmi,1,4) &NfeDtaEms = CtoD(&dhEmi) NfeDtaEms = &NfeDtaEms
&dhEmi = substr(&TNFeProc.NFe.infNFe.ide.dhEmi ,9,2) +'/'+ Substr(&TNFeProc.NFe.infNFe.ide.dhEmi,6,2) +'/'+ Substr(&TNFeProc.NFe.infNFe.ide.dhEmi,1,4) NfeDtaDsp = CtoD(&dhEmi)
//ATUALIZA DATAS DE FATURAMENTO RetornaDataFaturamento.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, &NfeDtaEms, &NfeDtaFat) NfeDtaFat = &NfeDtaFat if &NfeDtaFat.IsEmpty() NfeDtaFat_Mes = 0 NfeDtaFat_Ano = 0 Else NfeDtaFat_Mes = &NfeDtaFat.Month() NfeDtaFat_Ano = &NfeDtaFat.Year() Endif
NfeHorEms = Substr(&TNFeProc.NFe.infNFe.ide.dhEmi, 12,8)
ModCod = &TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.ide.mod NfeTipFrt.FromString(&TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.transp.modFrete.ToString())
NfeLctCod = &tmplctCod If &tmpImpEntSai = '1' NfeEntSai = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida Else NfeEntSai = Status_EntradaSaida.Entrada EndIF
NfeDadManAdi = &TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.infAdic.infAdFisco.ToUpper() + ' ' + &TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.infAdic.infCpl.ToUpper()
//DESTINATARIO if &tmpNfeProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.TERCEIROS NfeCliCod = &tmpEmixCod NfeCliRaz = &TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.emit.xNome.ToUpper()
&NfeCliCpf = &TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.emit.CPF validaCpfCnpj.Call(&NfeCliCpf, &Erro, 'N') NfeCliCpf = &NfeCliCpf
&NfeCliCnpj = &TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.emit.CNPJ validaCpfCnpj.Call(&NfeCliCnpj, &Erro, 'N') NfeCliCnpj = &NfeCliCnpj
if NfeCliCnpj.IsEmpty() NfeCliTipPes = TipoPessoa.FISICA Else NfeCliTipPes = TipoPessoa.JURIDICA EndIF
NfeCliFon = &TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.emit.enderemit.fone.ToUpper() NfeCliIns = &TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.emit.iE.ToUpper() //NfeCliSuf = &TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.emit.
NfeCliEnd = &TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.emit.enderemit.xLgr.ToUpper() NfeCliEndNro = &TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.emit.enderemit.nro.ToUpper() NfeCliBai = &TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.emit.enderemit.xBairro.ToUpper() NfeCliCep = &TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.emit.enderemit.CEP.ToUpper() NfeCliCpl = &TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.emit.enderemit.xCpl.ToUpper()
&NfeCliCidCod = 0 &CidIbge = val(&TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.emit.enderemit.cMun) do 'loadCidade' NfeCliCidCod = &NfeCliCidCod
NfeCliCidIbge = &CidIbge NfeCliCidNom = &NfeCliCidNom //PedCliEntCidNom NfeCliCidUF = &NfeCliCidUF Else NfeCliCod = &tmpDestxCod NfeCliRaz = &TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.dest.xNome.ToUpper()
&NfeCliCpf = &TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.dest.CPF validaCpfCnpj.Call(&NfeCliCpf, &Erro, 'N') NfeCliCpf = &NfeCliCpf
&NfeCliCnpj = &TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.dest.CNPJ validaCpfCnpj.Call(&NfeCliCnpj, &Erro, 'N') NfeCliCnpj = &NfeCliCnpj
if NfeCliCnpj.IsEmpty() NfeCliTipPes = TipoPessoa.FISICA Else NfeCliTipPes = TipoPessoa.JURIDICA EndIF
NfeCliFon = &TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.dest.enderDest.fone.ToUpper() NfeCliIns = &TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.dest.iE.ToUpper() //NfeCliSuf = &TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.dest.
NfeCliEnd = &TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.dest.enderDest.xLgr.ToUpper() NfeCliEndNro = &TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.dest.enderDest.nro.ToUpper() NfeCliBai = &TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.dest.enderDest.xBairro.ToUpper() NfeCliCep = &TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.dest.enderDest.CEP.ToUpper() NfeCliCpl = &TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.dest.enderDest.xCpl.ToUpper()
&NfeCliCidCod = 0 &CidIbge = val(&TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.dest.enderDest.cMun) do 'loadCidade' NfeCliCidCod = &NfeCliCidCod
NfeCliCidIbge = &CidIbge NfeCliCidNom = &NfeCliCidNom //PedCliEntCidNom NfeCliCidUF = &NfeCliCidUF EndIF
//// //TRANSPORTE //// NfeTraPlaCod = &NfeTraPlaCod //// NfeTraPlaUF = &NfeTraPlaUF //// NfeTraRntc = &NfeTraRntc //// NfeMotNom = &NfeMotNom //// NfeTraCod = &NfeTraCod //// NfeTraRaz = &NfeTraRaz //// NfeTraTipPes = &NfeTraTipPes //// NfeTraEnd = &NfeTraEnd //// NfeTraEndNro = &NfeTraEndNro //// NfeTraBai = &NfeTraBai //// NfeTraCnpj = &NfeTraCnpj //// NfeTraInsEst = &NfeTraInsEst //// NfeTraCpf = &NfeTraCpf //// NfeTipFrt = &NfeTipFrt //// NfePesLiq = &NfePesLiq //// NfePesBrt = &NfePesBrt //// NfeQtdVol = &NfeQtdVol //// NfeEspVol = &NfeEspVol //// NfeMarVol = &NfeMarVol //// NfeNroVol = &NfeNroVol //// NfeTraCidCod = &NfeTraCidCod //// &CidCod = &NfeTraCidCod //// do 'loadCidade' //// NfeTraCidNom = &NfeCliCidNom //// NfeTraCidUfeCod = &NfeCliCidUF
//OUTROS DADOS NfeArqXml = &TmpnfeArqXml
&Varchar = retornaSoNumeros.UDP(&TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.Id) NfeChv = &Varchar.Trim() // NfeProBasCofins = val(&TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.total.ICMSTot.) NfeVlrTotPro =val(&TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.total.ICMSTot.vProd) NfeVlrTotFrt = val(&TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.total.ICMSTot.vFrete) NfeVlrTotIpi = val(&TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.total.ICMSTot.vIPI) NfeVlrTot = val(&TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.total.ICMSTot.vNF) NfeVlrTotSeg = val(&TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.total.ICMSTot.vSeg) NfeVlrTotOutDsp = val(&TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.total.ICMSTot.vOutro) NfeVlrTotDsc = val(&TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.total.ICMSTot.vDesc) NfeVlrTotBasIcms = val(&TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.total.ICMSTot.vBC) NfeVlrTotIcms = val(&TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.total.ICMSTot.vICMS) NfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt = val(&TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.total.ICMSTot.vBCST) NfeVlrTotIcmsSt = val(&TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.total.ICMSTot.vST) // NfeVlrTotPdg = &TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.total.ICMSTot.v NfeVlrTotIpiDev = val(&TNFeProc.NFe.infNFe.total.ICMSTot.vIPIDevol) NfeEmiGnre = Status_SimNao.Nao
//NfeAutNumLot //NfeAutNumRec NfeAutDatHorRec = Substr(&TNfeProc.protNFe.infProt.dhRecbto, 1, 20) NfeAutNumPro = &TNfeProc.protNFe.infProt.nProt NfeAutDigVal = &TNfeProc.protNFe.infProt.digVal NfeAutSts = &TNfeProc.protNFe.infProt.cStat NfeAutMsg = &TNfeProc.protNFe.infProt.xMotivo NfeStsImp = 'S'
if NfeAutSts = '100' or NfeAutSts = '150' NfeSts = Status_NFe.Autorizada EndIF
EndNew
commit If &TNFeProc.NFe.infNFe.ide.NFrefs.Count > 0 &NfeDocRefCod = 0 For &NFref in &TNFeProc.NFe.infNFe.ide.NFrefs &NfeDocRefCod+=1 New EmpCod = &EmpCod FilCod = &tmpNfeFatFilCod NfeCod = &NfeCod NfeDocRefCod = &NfeDocRefCod NfeDocRefNfe = &NFref.refNFe EndNew EndFor commit
EndIf
Else For Each Order tmpNFeCod Where tmpNFeCod = &tmpNfeCod &tmpDestxCod = tmpDestxCod &tmpEmixCod = tmpEmixCod &tmpNfeProTer = tmpNfeProTer &tmpImpEntSai = tmpImpEntSai &tmplctCod = tmpLctCod &TmpnfeArqXml = tmpNfeArqXml &tmpNfeFatFilCod = tmpNfeFatFilCod
tmpStsNF = 'S' Exit EndFor
commit
LeituraXmlDanfe.Call(&TmpnfeArqXml, &TNfeProc)
&NfeCod = &parNfeCod
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &tmpNfeFatFilCod Where NfeCod = &NfeCod NfeFilCod = 1 NfePedCod = &PedCod &Varchar = RetornaSoNumeros.Udp(&TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.ide.nNF) NfeNum = val(&Varchar) NfeSer = &TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.ide.serie.Trim() NfeSts = Status_NFe.Digitando NfeProTer = &tmpNfeProTer
NfeFin.FromString(&TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.ide.finNFe.ToString())
&dhEmi = substr(&TNFeProc.NFe.infNFe.ide.dhEmi ,9,2) +'/'+ Substr(&TNFeProc.NFe.infNFe.ide.dhEmi,6,2) +'/'+ Substr(&TNFeProc.NFe.infNFe.ide.dhEmi,1,4) &NfeDtaEms = CtoD(&dhEmi) NfeDtaEms = &NfeDtaEms
&dhEmi = substr(&TNFeProc.NFe.infNFe.ide.dhEmi ,9,2) +'/'+ Substr(&TNFeProc.NFe.infNFe.ide.dhEmi,6,2) +'/'+ Substr(&TNFeProc.NFe.infNFe.ide.dhEmi,1,4) NfeDtaDsp = CtoD(&dhEmi)
//ATUALIZA DATAS DE FATURAMENTO RetornaDataFaturamento.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, &NfeDtaEms, &NfeDtaFat) NfeDtaFat = &NfeDtaFat if &NfeDtaFat.IsEmpty() NfeDtaFat_Mes = 0 NfeDtaFat_Ano = 0 Else NfeDtaFat_Mes = &NfeDtaFat.Month() NfeDtaFat_Ano = &NfeDtaFat.Year() Endif
NfeHorEms = Substr(&TNFeProc.NFe.infNFe.ide.dhEmi, 12,8)
ModCod = &TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.ide.mod NfeTipFrt.FromString(&TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.transp.modFrete.ToString())
NfeLctCod = &tmplctCod If &tmpImpEntSai = '1' NfeEntSai = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida Else NfeEntSai = Status_EntradaSaida.Entrada EndIF
NfeDadManAdi = &TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.infAdic.infAdFisco.ToUpper() + ' ' + &TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.infAdic.infCpl.ToUpper()
//DESTINATARIO if &tmpNfeProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.TERCEIROS NfeCliCod = &tmpEmixCod NfeCliRaz = &TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.emit.xNome.ToUpper()
&NfeCliCpf = &TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.emit.CPF validaCpfCnpj.Call(&NfeCliCpf, &Erro, 'N') NfeCliCpf = &NfeCliCpf
&NfeCliCnpj = &TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.emit.CNPJ validaCpfCnpj.Call(&NfeCliCnpj, &Erro, 'N') NfeCliCnpj = &NfeCliCnpj
if NfeCliCnpj.IsEmpty() NfeCliTipPes = TipoPessoa.FISICA Else NfeCliTipPes = TipoPessoa.JURIDICA EndIF
NfeCliFon = &TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.emit.enderemit.fone.ToUpper() NfeCliIns = &TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.emit.iE.ToUpper() //NfeCliSuf = &TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.emit.
NfeCliEnd = &TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.emit.enderemit.xLgr.ToUpper() NfeCliEndNro = &TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.emit.enderemit.nro.ToUpper() NfeCliBai = &TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.emit.enderemit.xBairro.ToUpper() NfeCliCep = &TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.emit.enderemit.CEP.ToUpper() NfeCliCpl = &TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.emit.enderemit.xCpl.ToUpper()
&NfeCliCidCod = 0 &CidIbge = val(&TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.emit.enderemit.cMun) do 'loadCidade' NfeCliCidCod = &NfeCliCidCod
NfeCliCidIbge = &CidIbge NfeCliCidNom = &NfeCliCidNom //PedCliEntCidNom NfeCliCidUF = &NfeCliCidUF Else NfeCliCod = &tmpDestxCod NfeCliRaz = &TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.dest.xNome.ToUpper()
&NfeCliCpf = &TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.dest.CPF validaCpfCnpj.Call(&NfeCliCpf, &Erro, 'N') NfeCliCpf = &NfeCliCpf
&NfeCliCnpj = &TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.dest.CNPJ validaCpfCnpj.Call(&NfeCliCnpj, &Erro, 'N') NfeCliCnpj = &NfeCliCnpj
if NfeCliCnpj.IsEmpty() NfeCliTipPes = TipoPessoa.FISICA Else NfeCliTipPes = TipoPessoa.JURIDICA EndIF
NfeCliFon = &TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.dest.enderDest.fone.ToUpper() NfeCliIns = &TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.dest.iE.ToUpper() //NfeCliSuf = &TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.dest.
NfeCliEnd = &TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.dest.enderDest.xLgr.ToUpper() NfeCliEndNro = &TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.dest.enderDest.nro.ToUpper() NfeCliBai = &TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.dest.enderDest.xBairro.ToUpper() NfeCliCep = &TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.dest.enderDest.CEP.ToUpper() NfeCliCpl = &TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.dest.enderDest.xCpl.ToUpper()
&NfeCliCidCod = 0 &CidIbge = val(&TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.dest.enderDest.cMun) do 'loadCidade' NfeCliCidCod = &NfeCliCidCod
NfeCliCidIbge = &CidIbge NfeCliCidNom = &NfeCliCidNom //PedCliEntCidNom NfeCliCidUF = &NfeCliCidUF EndIF
//// //TRANSPORTE //// NfeTraPlaCod = &NfeTraPlaCod //// NfeTraPlaUF = &NfeTraPlaUF //// NfeTraRntc = &NfeTraRntc //// NfeMotNom = &NfeMotNom //// NfeTraCod = &NfeTraCod //// NfeTraRaz = &NfeTraRaz //// NfeTraTipPes = &NfeTraTipPes //// NfeTraEnd = &NfeTraEnd //// NfeTraEndNro = &NfeTraEndNro //// NfeTraBai = &NfeTraBai //// NfeTraCnpj = &NfeTraCnpj //// NfeTraInsEst = &NfeTraInsEst //// NfeTraCpf = &NfeTraCpf //// NfeTipFrt = &NfeTipFrt //// NfePesLiq = &NfePesLiq //// NfePesBrt = &NfePesBrt //// NfeQtdVol = &NfeQtdVol //// NfeEspVol = &NfeEspVol //// NfeMarVol = &NfeMarVol //// NfeNroVol = &NfeNroVol //// NfeTraCidCod = &NfeTraCidCod //// &CidCod = &NfeTraCidCod //// do 'loadCidade' //// NfeTraCidNom = &NfeCliCidNom //// NfeTraCidUfeCod = &NfeCliCidUF
//OUTROS DADOS NfeArqXml = &TmpnfeArqXml
&Varchar = retornaSoNumeros.UDP(&TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.Id) NfeChv = &Varchar.Trim()
NfeVlrTotPro =val(&TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.total.ICMSTot.vProd) NfeVlrTotFrt = val(&TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.total.ICMSTot.vFrete) NfeVlrTotIpi = val(&TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.total.ICMSTot.vIPI) NfeVlrTot = val(&TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.total.ICMSTot.vNF) NfeVlrTotSeg = val(&TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.total.ICMSTot.vSeg) NfeVlrTotOutDsp = val(&TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.total.ICMSTot.vOutro) NfeVlrTotDsc = val(&TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.total.ICMSTot.vDesc) NfeVlrTotBasIcms = val(&TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.total.ICMSTot.vBC) NfeVlrTotIcms = val(&TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.total.ICMSTot.vICMS) NfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt = val(&TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.total.ICMSTot.vBCST) NfeVlrTotIcmsSt = val(&TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.total.ICMSTot.vST) // NfeVlrTotPdg = &TNfeProc.NFe.infNFe.total.ICMSTot.v NfeVlrTotIpiDev = val(&TNFeProc.NFe.infNFe.total.ICMSTot.vIPIDevol) NfeEmiGnre = Status_SimNao.Nao
//NfeAutNumLot //NfeAutNumRec NfeAutDatHorRec = Substr(&TNfeProc.protNFe.infProt.dhRecbto, 1, 20) NfeAutNumPro = &TNfeProc.protNFe.infProt.nProt NfeAutDigVal = &TNfeProc.protNFe.infProt.digVal NfeAutSts = &TNfeProc.protNFe.infProt.cStat NfeAutMsg = &TNfeProc.protNFe.infProt.xMotivo NfeStsImp = 'S'
if NfeAutSts = '100' or NfeAutSts = '150' NfeSts = Status_NFe.Autorizada EndIF
Exit EndFor
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod, NfeItmCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &tmpNfeFatFilCod Where NfeCod = &NfeCod Delete EndFor
EndIf
Commit
For Each Order tmpNFeCod, tmpNfeItmCod Where tmpNFeCod = &tmpNfeCod
New NfeItmCod = tmpNfeItmCod NfeProCod = tmpProCod NfeProGraCod = tmpProGraCod NfeProNom = tmpProNom //NfeProDadAdi NfeNcmCod = tmpNcmCod NfeNcmCest = tmpNcmCEST NfeOriTriCod = tmpNfeOriCod NfeSitCod = tmpImpNfeSitCod &tmpEntCFOP = retornaSoNumeros.Udp(tmpEntCFOP) NfeCfoCod = Substr(&tmpEntCFOP,1,1) + '.' + Substr(&tmpEntCFOP,2,3) NfeProVlrDig = Status_SimNao.Nao //mater o digitado &ProCod = tmpProCod &ProGraCod = tmpProGraCod do 'getProduto' NfeEmbUnd = &ProEmbUnd NfeProRctPen = &ProStsRag //Receituario NfeProCBenef = tmpCBenef
//QUANTIDADE NOTA // NfeProQtd = tmpPedQtd
// &ProCod = tmpProCod // &ProGraCod = tmpProGraCod if not tmpProQtdCmpEmb.IsEmpty() and Not tmpProQtdCmpEmb.IsNull() &ProForQtdEmb = tmpProQtdCmpEmb Else &ProForQtdEmb = 1 EndIF
// //fazer buscar somente para quem nao quer repetido // If &DuplicadoCompra <> 'S' //NAO ACEITA DUPLICADOS // RetornaProdutoPedido.Call('N', &EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, &ProCod, &ProGraCod, &PedItmCod, &PedItmIpi, &PedItmIcmSt, &PedItmIcm, &PedItmAcr, &PedItmDsc, &PedQtd, &PedVlrUnt, &PedVlrItm, &PedItmCmp) // Else //ACEITA DUPLICADOS // RetornaProdutoPedido.Call('S', &EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, &ProCod, &ProGraCod, &PedItmCod, &PedItmIpi, &PedItmIcmSt, &PedItmIcm, &PedItmAcr, &PedItmDsc, &PedQtd, &PedVlrUnt, &PedVlrItm, &PedItmCmp) // EndIF
&PedQtdEmb = tmpPedQtd Do case Case &ProForQtdEmb > 0 &PedQtd = ((&PedQtdEmb * &ProForQtdEmb)) if tmpPedVlrUnt > 0 and &ProForQtdEmb <> 0 &tmpPedVlrUnt = tmpPedVlrUnt / &ProForQtdEmb Endif
Case &ProForQtdEmb < 0 and &PedQtdEmb > 0 &PedQtd = (&PedQtdEmb / (&ProForQtdEmb*-1)) &tmpPedVlrUnt = tmpPedVlrUnt * (&ProForQtdEmb*-1)
Otherwise &PedQtd = &PedQtdEmb &tmpPedVlrUnt = tmpPedVlrUnt EndCase
NfeProQtd = &PedQtd //FIM QUANTIDADE NOTA
NfeProVlrUnt = &tmpPedVlrUnt
NfeProVlrTot = tmpPedVlrTot NfeProVlrDsc = tmpPedVlrDsc NfeProBasIcms = tmpProBasVlrIcm NfeProTaxIcms = tmpProPerIcm NfeProTaxRedIcms = tmpProPerRedIcm NfeProVlrIcms = tmpProVlrIcm NfeProBasIcmsSt = tmpProBasVlrIcmSt NfeProTaxIcmsSt = tmpProPerIcmSt NfeProTaxRedIcmsSt = tmpProPerRedIcmSt NfeProVlrImcsSt = tmpProVlrIcmSt NfeProTaxMvaSt = tmpNfeProTaxMvaSt NfeProBasIpi = tmpProBasVlrIpi NfeProTaxIpi = tmpProPerIpi NfeProVlrIpi = tmpProVlrIpi
NfeProVlrFrt = tmpProVlrFrt NfeProVlrOutDsp = tmpProVlrOut
//Credito Icms NfeTaxCrd = tmpNfeTaxCrd NfeVlrCrd = tmpNfeVlrCrd NfeProTaxDif = tmpProPerDif NfeProVlrDif = tmpProVlrDif
//imposto devolvido - IPI NfeIpiDevPer = tmpNfeIpiDevPer NfeIpiDevVlr = tmpNfeIpiDevVlr
//NfeProVlrSeg = Tmpprovlr
//&det.imposto.IPI.cEnq = '999'
For &det in &TNFeProc.NFe.infNFe.dets if &det.nItem = trim(str(tmpNfeItmCod)) Do Case Case &det.imposto.IPI.IPINT.CST = '99' NfeCstIpi = '99'
Case &det.imposto.IPI.IPINT.CST = '49' NfeCstIpi = '49'
Case &det.imposto.IPI.IPITrib.CST = '99' NfeCstIpi = '99' // NfeproTaxIpi = val(&det.imposto.IPI.IPITrib.pIPI) // NfeproBasIpi = val(&det.imposto.IPI.IPITrib.vBC) // NfeproVlrIpi = val(&det.imposto.IPI.IPITrib.vIPI)
Case &det.imposto.IPI.IPITrib.CST = '49' NfeCstIpi = '49' // NfeproTaxPIS = val(&det.imposto.IPI.IPITrib.pIPI) // NfeproBasIpi = val(&det.imposto.IPI.IPITrib.vBC) // NfeproVlrIpi = val(&det.imposto.IPI.IPITrib.vIPI)
case not &det.imposto.IPI.IPITrib.CST.IsEmpty() NfeCstIpi.FromString(&det.imposto.IPI.IPITrib.CST)
Case not &det.imposto.IPI.IPINT.CST.IsEmpty() NfeCstIpi.FromString(&det.imposto.IPI.IPINT.CST) Endcase
//Novo PIS &Varchar = tmpImpCstPis.ToFormattedString() Do Case Case &Varchar in ('04','06','07','08','09','71','72','73','74','75') NfeCstPIS.FromString(&Varchar)
Otherwise NfeCstPIS.FromString(&Varchar) NfeProBasPIS = tmpImpNfeBasPis NfeProTaxPIS = tmpImpTaxPis NfeProVlrPIS = tmpImpVlrPis EndCase
// //antigo PIS // Do Case // Case &det.imposto.PIS.PISAliq.CST in ('01','02') // NfeCstPIS.FromString(&det.imposto.PIS.PISAliq.CST) // NfeProBasPIS = val(&det.imposto.PIS.PISAliq.vBC) // NfeProTaxPIS = val(&det.imposto.PIS.PISAliq.pPIS) // NfeProVlrPIS = val(&det.imposto.PIS.PISAliq.vPIS) // // // Case &det.imposto.PIS.PISQtde.CST = '03' // NfeCstPIS.FromString(&det.imposto.PIS.PISQtde.CST) // NfeProBasPIS = val(&det.imposto.PIS.PISAliq.vBC) // NfeProTaxPIS = val(&det.imposto.PIS.PISQtde.vAliqProd) // NfeProVlrPIS = val(&det.imposto.PIS.PISQtde.vPIS) // // Case &det.imposto.PIS.PISNT.CST in ('04','06','07','08','09') // NfeCstPIS.FromString(&det.imposto.PIS.PISNT.CST) // // Case &det.imposto.PIS.PISOutr.CST in ('99', '49', '98') // NfeCstPIS.FromString(&det.imposto.PIS.PISOutr.CST) // NfeProBasPIS = val(&det.imposto.PIS.PISAliq.vBC) // NfeProTaxPIS = val(&det.imposto.PIS.PISOutr.pPIS) // NfeProVlrPIS = val(&det.imposto.PIS.PISOutr.vPIS) // // Otherwise // NfeCstPIS.FromString(&det.imposto.PIS.PISNT.CST) // // EndCase
//NOVO COFINS &Varchar = tmpImpCstPis.ToFormattedString() //pega do PIS pois é o mesmo campo quando importa Do Case Case &Varchar in ('04','06','07','08','09','71','72','73','74','75') NfeCstCofins.FromString(&Varchar)
Otherwise NfeCstCofins.FromString(&Varchar) NfeProBasCofins = tmpImpNfeBasPis NfeProTaxCofins = tmpImpTaxCofins NfeproVlrCofins = tmpImpVlrCofins EndCase
//Antigo COFINS // Do Case // Case &det.imposto.COFINS.COFINSAliq.CST in('01','02') // NfeCstCofins.FromString(&det.imposto.COFINS.COFINSAliq.CST) // NfeProBasCofins = val(&det.imposto.COFINS.COFINSAliq.vBC) // NfeProTaxCofins = val(&det.imposto.COFINS.COFINSAliq.pCOFINS) // NfeproVlrCofins = val(&det.imposto.COFINS.COFINSAliq.vCOFINS) // // // Case &det.imposto.COFINS.COFINSQtde.CST = '03' // NfeCstCofins.FromString(&det.imposto.COFINS.COFINSQtde.CST) // NfeProBasCofins = val(&det.imposto.COFINS.COFINSAliq.vBC) // NfeProTaxCofins = val(&det.imposto.COFINS.COFINSQtde.vAliqProd) // NfeproVlrCofins = val(&det.imposto.COFINS.COFINSQtde.vCOFINS) // // Case &det.imposto.COFINS.COFINSNT.CST in ('04','06','07','08','09') // NfeCstCofins.FromString(&det.imposto.COFINS.COFINSNT.CST) // // Case &det.imposto.COFINS.COFINSOutr.CST in ('99', '49', '98') // NfeCstCofins.FromString(&det.imposto.COFINS.COFINSOutr.CST) // NfeProBasCofins = val(&det.imposto.COFINS.COFINSAliq.vBC) // NfeProTaxCofins = val(&det.imposto.COFINS.COFINSOutr.pCOFINS) // NfeproVlrCofins = val(&det.imposto.COFINS.COFINSOutr.vCOFINS) // // Otherwise // NfeCstCofins.FromString(&det.imposto.COFINS.COFINSNT.CST) // EndCase Endif EndFor
NfePedItmCod = tmpNfeItmCod
// NfeProVlrApxTrib // NfeProVlrIcmsDif // NfeProTaxIcmsDif // NfeProBar EndNew EndFor
commit
Sub 'loadCidade' for Each Order EmpCod, CidIBGE where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where CidIBGE = &CidIbge
&NfeCliCidCod = CidCod &NfeCliCidNom = CidNom &NfeCliCidUF = UfeCod Exit EndFor EndSub
Sub 'getProduto' &ProEmbUnd.SetEmpty() For Each Order EmpCod, ProCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where ProCod = &ProCod Where ProGraCod = &ProGraCod // &ProNom = ProNomGra // &ProBar = ProGraBar &ProEmbUnd = ProEmbUnd &ProStsRag = ProStsRag // &ProQtdCmpEmb = RetornaQtdEmbalagem.Udp(EmpCod, &tmpEmixCod, ProCod) // &NcmCod = NcmCod // &auxProQtdCmpEmb = &ProQtdCmpEmb Exit EndFor EndSub
